src: Delta for Roblox PC Edition is a lightweight and optimized Roblox client for Windows. Enjoy higher FPS, reduced input lag, better graphics, and smoother gameplay. The best desktop edition for playing Roblox with enhanced performance and modern features.
ja: Delta for Roblox PC EditionはWindows向けの軽量最適化Robloxクライアント。高FPS・低入力遅延・高品質グラフィック・滑らかなゲームプレイを実現する、パフォーマンス強化と最新機能を備えた最高のデスクトップ版。
